overview.description: Newton + IsaacLab-oriented migration workspace for reproducing DiffAero training, dynamics, and task capabilities with a unified registry-driven training entry.

architecture.style: layered differentiable-RL stack with registry-driven composition
patterns: runtime split between IsaacLab launch and Newton-only shim

key_components.name: Unified Registry
key_components.description: Constructs algorithms, dynamics configs, and environments through one public assembly surface.

key_components.name: Unified Train Entry
key_components.description: Top-level CLI for registry-backed training and smoke validation.

key_components.name: Quadrotor Dynamics
key_components.description: Newton + Warp-backed quadrotor dynamics and body-rate controller path.

key_components.name: PointMass Dynamics
key_components.description: Continuous and discrete point-mass differentiable dynamics variants.

key_components.name: Core Drone Environment
key_components.description: Base differentiable 5-tuple environment contract shared by several tasks.

key_components.name: Obstacle Task Stack
key_components.description: Obstacle avoidance environment plus sensor-aware observations.

key_components.name: Racing Task Stack
key_components.description: Figure-8 gate racing task with gate-frame observations and reward/loss shaping.

key_components.name: Training Algorithms
key_components.description: APG, PPO/APPO, SHAC, MASHAC, and DreamerV3/world implementations.

features.name: Obstacle, racing, MAPC, and sim2real environments
